story_prompt: make a lecture on js class

scenes.text: JavaScript classes provide a blueprint for creating objects, encapsulating data with code to work on that data. They are an essential aspect of JavaScript programming, allowing developers to implement object-oriented principles. Classes enhance code reusability, maintainability, and the overall structure of applications by allowing the declaration of methods specific to a particular object type.

JavaScript classes also support inheritance, allowing one class to extend the functionality of another. This provides a powerful mechanism for code reuse and is essential for implementing polymorphic behavior. By inheriting properties and methods from a parent class, a child class can override or extend functionalities, allowing for more sophisticated program architectures.
